characters.name: Alien worker
characters.description: Analien workerof theMimbanesespecies served as a mechanic for the MagistrateGreef Karga. He helped fixDin Djarin's ship, theRazor Crest, but was, in reality, a spy forGideon's Imperial holdout. The worker had put a tracking device on theRazor Crestwhile repairing it, and soon reported the news to anImperial comms officer, who then informed MoffGideonhimself about it.

characters.name: Baylan Skoll
characters.description: Baylan Skollwas formerly aJediGeneralof theJedi Orderin the Grand Army of the Galactic Republic until he left the Jedi. He survived the Great Jedi Purge and then became a mercenary. During theNew Republicera, he, along with his apprentice,Shin Hati, assistedMorgan Elsbethin findingGrand AdmiralThrawn. Baylan Skoll is portrayed byRay StevensoninAhsoka.
